data._note: MVP actor templates. Stat keys match EchoFactory output (max_hp, atk, def, agi, int, cha). When core/actors/ is built, these templates are loaded and instantiated at runtime — do not store actor state here. Values are placeholders; tune once combat math is implemented. Groups are referenced by realms.json generation rules (group_pools); the realm controls which groups can appear — actor templates and groups are content only, not wired to any realm directly.

enemy.dust_wanderer.name: Dust Wanderer
enemy.dust_wanderer.description: A drifting spirit corrupted by the vale's desolation. Slow but relentless.

enemy.dust_sentinel.name: Dust Sentinel
enemy.dust_sentinel.description: A hardened remnant that guards corrupted waymarkers. Tougher and more deliberate than a wanderer.

enemy.vale_brute.name: Vale Brute
enemy.vale_brute.description: A massive corrupted form that anchors enemy formations. High threat in close quarters.

enemy.ashen_revenant.name: Ashen Revenant
enemy.ashen_revenant.description: A spirit that has calcified into something colder and more dangerous. Strikes from a distance.

enemy.ashen_wraith.name: Ashen Wraith
enemy.ashen_wraith.description: Fragile but extremely fast. Moves in packs and overwhelms isolated echoes.

enemy.hollow_golem.name: Hollow Golem
enemy.hollow_golem.description: A construct born from compressed ashen grief. Nearly immovable. Devastating if reached.

structure.corrupted_shrine.name: Corrupted Shrine
structure.corrupted_shrine.description: A sanctified marker overwhelmed by corruption. Must be purified before it is destroyed.
structure.corrupted_shrine._note: Purify threshold: echoes can purify (restore HP) only when shrine HP is below 50%. Purify is an action instead of attacking. Stat requirements for purify are deferred to core/actors/ (cha or int check, TBD).

structure.ancient_totem.name: Ancient Totem
structure.ancient_totem.description: A relic of enormous weight — spiritual and physical. Carrying it debuffs the bearer.
structure.ancient_totem._note: carryable_chance: 60% chance this totem can be picked up (per EncounterResolutionModes). Carrier debuff magnitude is deferred to core/actors/. Enemies can steal the totem and deal double damage.

spirit.lost_wanderer.name: Lost Wanderer
spirit.lost_wanderer.description: A displaced spirit searching for its place of rest. Gentle, but capable of brief resistance when threatened.
spirit.lost_wanderer._note: combat_join_chance: 50% chance spirit joins battle during guide_spirit mode. combat_damage_factor: 25% damage debuff when fighting (per EncounterResolutionModes). If successfully protected/escorted, may be offered as a free summon.

groups._note: Spawn groups referenced by realms.json group_pools. StageGenerator picks a group per objective using a derived seed, then instantiates one actor per template_id per count. Wave-based modes cycle the group each wave. tier matches the highest enemy tier in the group — used by StageGenerator for difficulty validation.

group.vale_patrol_md.description: A larger patrol with a sentinel anchor.

group.vale_totem_assault.description: Coordinated group trying to seize and destroy the totem.

group.vale_spirit_threat.description: Enemies drawn to a wandering spirit's presence.

group.vale_boss_guard.description: The heavy guard of the Elder Waymarker. Designed as a final boss challenge for realm.01.

group.hollow_scouts.description: Fast-moving advance force from the Ashen Hollow.

group.hollow_wraith_pack.description: A swarm of wraiths. High pressure, low durability.

group.hollow_shrine_assault.description: Mixed force assaulting a shrine in the hollow.

group.hollow_totem_siege.description: Coordinated siege force — revenants hold range while wraiths rush the totem.

group.hollow_boss_guard.description: The Hollow Golem's escort. Final boss challenge for realm.02.
